## What changed

<!-- Briefly describe the nature of the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Database migration
- [ ] Configuration / deployment change
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `go vet ./...` produces no warnings
- [ ] `gofmt` applied to all modified files
- [ ] If a migration was added — tested on a clean database (`migrate up` and `migrate down`)
- [ ] Docker image builds locally
